name: Digerati Technologies, Inc.
summary: Digerati Technologies, Inc. (DTGI) operates through subsidiaries including Verve Cloud, Inc. (formerly T3 Communications, Inc.) and VerveTX (formerly Shift8 Networks, Inc.), providing cloud-based communications and telecommunications services. The company offers services under brands including Nexogy, Next Level Internet, T3 Communications, and operates under a credit agreement with significant debt obligations including Term Loan A and Term Loan C totaling over $38 million.

products.name: Term Loan A
products.description: Credit facility with principal of not less than $26,559,733.26 as of November 22, 2023

products.name: Term Loan C
products.description: Credit facility with principal of not less than $12,377,527.38 as of November 22, 2023, maturity extended to December 31, 2023

products.name: Specified Financing
products.description: Term loan of $2,000,000 applied for from a commercially recognized third-party lender

products.name: Cloud Communications Services
products.description: Cloud-based communications services provided under brands Nexogy, Next Level Internet, and T3 Communications.

products.name: Term Loan Financing
products.description: The company sought a $2,000,000 specified financing term loan from a third-party lender.
